text.title: api-authentication Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-authentication as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Storing API keys in plaintext or comparing with ==.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Timing attack on == leaks the key character by character under sufficient requests. Plaintext storage means a DB dump exposes all keys.
